title: Minecraft Robot Manhunt (Fan-made)
description: This datapack is a fanmade of the famous Kyelong's AI Hunter datapack. If you like doing manhunts but can't get your friends on then this datapack will suit you perfectly! This datapack tries to imitate the same bahavior as a human.
body:
This (fan-made) datapack mimics the human behavior.. original datapack: https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/ai-hunter-minecraft-manhunt-but-you-have-no-friend-speedrunner-vs-terminator/

If you ever wanted to make a Minecraft Manhunt like Dream but you couldn't get your friends on, then this datapack is your best option.

This fan-made is a sort of DLC of the original datapack so here are some of the features added:

- Hunters use bows

- Hunters learn from your action (LAI powered)

- You can hide from the hunters

- The hunter vs player combat system has been revamped to look more realistic

- Hunters can trap the player

- Hunters gather food

- Hunters steal from your furnace


There are MANY more features that you can discover either by playing the datapack or by looking at the entire changelog on the AI Hunt Comunity's Discord server: 

                    JOIN BELOW
[ https://discord.gg/Bn5HUWWsSn ]
